title: Atlas genome config v1
description: An assembly file (one .fa). Coordinates only mean something against a genome — re-assembly produces a NEW genome_id; coordinates do not cross. Genomes carry species_composition (which species' DNA is in this assembly?) and per-chromosome subgenome tags (for hybrid assemblies). FK target for cohort.genome_id.

genome_id.description: Unique short identifier. Used as folder slug under data/genomes/ and as FK from cohort.genome_id. Stable forever.

fasta.description: Filename of the reference FASTA, relative to the genome's data root (e.g. data/genomes/{genome_id}/fasta).

fai.description: Filename of the .fai index, relative to the same root.

version.description: Assembly version label. Re-assemblies bump this AND must use a new genome_id (the registry treats genome_ids as immutable).

source.description: Where this assembly came from: 'in_house_HiFi_2026', 'NCBI_GCF_xxx', 'Ensembl_release_113', 'unpublished_v1'. Free-form.

species_composition.description: Set of species_ids whose DNA is in this assembly. Size 1 for pure-species genomes (e.g. ['gariepinus']). Size 2+ for hybrid assemblies that contain multiple parental subgenomes concatenated (e.g. ['gariepinus', 'macrocephalus']). Each entry must reference an existing species.config.species_id.

n_chromosomes.description: Number of pseudochromosomes / contigs of interest in this assembly. Should match chromosomes[] length when chromosomes[] is provided.

chrom_naming_pattern.description: Pattern for chromosome names, used for documentation and validation. e.g. 'C_gar_LG{NN}' or 'LG{NN}'.

chromosomes.description: Per-chromosome metadata. Optional — but required if species_composition has more than one species (so subgenome tags are unambiguous). Each entry includes name, length, and optional subgenome_of for hybrid assemblies.

name.description: Chromosome name as it appears in the .fai (e.g. 'C_gar_LG28', 'LG12').

subgenome_of.description: When the assembly is hybrid (species_composition size >= 2), tags which species' DNA this chromosome originated from. Must be one of species_composition[]. null for non-hybrid assemblies or when subgenome assignment is uncertain.

label.description: Optional display label distinct from the technical name.

annotation.description: Optional pointers to annotation files. Free-form; populate as needed.

gff.description: Path to GFF/GTF annotation, relative to genome data root.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this assembly: known issues, QV, contiguity stats.

_constraints._doc: Validation constraints not directly expressible in JSON Schema. Engine enforces:
_constraints._constraint_1: every species_id in species_composition must exist in a registered species.config
_constraints._constraint_2: if species_composition.length >= 2, every chromosomes[*].subgenome_of must be in species_composition[]
_constraints._constraint_3: if chromosomes[] is provided, n_chromosomes (when present) must match its length

hybrid_assembly.label: F1 hybrid assembly (gariepinus x macrocephalus, gariepinus-named pseudochromosomes)
hybrid_assembly.notes: QV60+, T2T-class. Both subgenomes concatenated in one fasta.
